node.statement: APPROX A5 (Plane -> Haldane sphere): Replace R^2 with sphere S^2, radius R=sqrt(S)*ell, threaded by 2S Dirac flux quanta. Monopole field: B=hbar*S/(eR^2). LLL has FINITE 2S+1 orbitals. Full rotational symmetry SO(3). In limit R,S->inf, 2S+1->inf: recovers planar geometry exactly. ADVANTAGES: (1) finite Hilbert space, (2) no edges/boundaries, (3) total angular momentum L is good quantum number. COST: finite-size effects needing N->inf extrapolation. SHIFT: 2S = N/nu - S_shift where S_shift is topological (=q for nu=1/q Laughlin). [P01-Haldane p.605; P04-Fano Sec II eqs (1)-(9)]
